meaning: n.(电影制片厂的)外景场地
examples: The Lifeboat still was taken in the water tank of a Hollywood backlot.
The blaze started on the huge backlot at about 4:45 a.m., fire officials said.

Downtown is basically a studio backlot for car commercials on some days.
Another block or so west is Sony Studios (www.sonypicturesstudios.com), where you can join the studio audience of Jeopardy or Wheel of Fortune, or just take the backlot tour.
